summary: Comprehensive testing of new features completed. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working (100%). All new features successfully implemented: 4km PB (replaced 5km), Claude AI integration, profile edit modal, gold medals system with gap calculation, and Strava integration with scope limitation handling.
action_items: No critical issues found - all new features working correctly
All requested features verified and functional
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: 4km PB correctly implemented (time: 16:08, pace: 4:01/km, date: 2025-09-20)
✓ Backend: 5km PB successfully removed from profile data
✓ Backend: Profile PATCH endpoint updates age and weight with proper persistence
✓ Backend: Medals endpoint returns 5 distances with gold targets and status
✓ Backend: Gap calculation working for silver medals (4km: 40s gap, 4 silver medals total)
✓ Backend: AI switched from GPT-5.2 to Claude (anthropic, claude-4-sonnet-20250514)
✓ Backend: Strava profile API returns Daniele Pascolini with connected status
✓ Backend: Strava activities API correctly returns needs_reauth=true due to scope limitation
✓ Backend: Strava sync returns proper scope message mentioning activity:read
✓ Frontend: Profilo tab displays Strava connection with 'Daniele Pascolini • Connesso'
✓ Frontend: 4km PB displayed prominently (16:08, 4:01/km) - 5km PB not shown
✓ Frontend: Personal Best section shows 4km, 6km, 10km, 15km (no 5km)
✓ Frontend: Edit profile modal opens with testID 'edit-profile-btn'
✓ Frontend: Modal shows age and weight input fields with proper testIDs
✓ Frontend: Modal can accept input and be closed with cancel button
✓ Frontend: MEDAGLIE sub-tab accessible and displays correctly
✓ Frontend: All 5 medal distances displayed (4km, 6km, 10km, 15km, 21.1km)
✓ Frontend: Each medal shows 'TARGET ORO' label with gold target time and pace
✓ Frontend: Silver medals show 'GAP' label with time to improve (4 medals)
✓ Frontend: Progress bars visible for silver medals
✓ Frontend: Strava SYNC button functional with testID 'strava-sync-btn'
✓ Frontend: Sync button shows alert message mentioning activity:read scope
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Existing seed data sufficient for testing new features.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working. PB changed from 5km to 4km successfully. AI switched to Claude (backend code confirmed). Profile edit modal functional. Medals system with 5 distances, gold targets, and gap calculation working. Strava integration shows connected profile (Daniele Pascolini) and properly handles scope limitation for activities with needs_reauth flag.

backend_test_details.profile_4km_pb: ✓ GET /api/profile returns 4km PB: time=16:08, pace=4:01/km, date=2025-09-20
backend_test_details.profile_no_5km: ✓ 5km PB successfully removed from profile (not in pbs object)
backend_test_details.profile_update: ✓ PATCH /api/profile updates age (40→41→40) and weight (68→69.5→68) with persistence verified
backend_test_details.medals_targets: ✓ All medals have gold_target, gold_pace, and status fields
backend_test_details.medals_gap: ✓ Silver medals show gap_seconds (4km: 40s to gold, 4 silver medals total)
backend_test_details.strava_sync: ✓ POST /api/strava/sync returns: message about activity:read scope, needs_reauth=true

frontend_test_details.profilo_strava: ✓ Strava card shows 'STRAVA' label, 'Daniele Pascolini • Connesso' text
frontend_test_details.profilo_edit_button: ✓ Edit button (pencil icon) visible next to 'DATI PERSONALI' with testID
frontend_test_details.edit_modal_inputs: ✓ Age input (testID: edit-age-input) and weight input (testID: edit-weight-input) present
frontend_test_details.edit_modal_functional: ✓ Inputs accept values (42, 70), modal closes with cancel button
frontend_test_details.medaglie_tab: ✓ MEDAGLIE sub-tab accessible and displays medal cards
frontend_test_details.medaglie_targets: ✓ 5 'TARGET ORO' labels found with gold times and paces
frontend_test_details.medaglie_gaps: ✓ 4 'GAP' labels found showing time to improve for silver medals
frontend_test_details.medaglie_progress: ✓ Progress bars (green bars) visible under silver medal cards
frontend_test_details.strava_sync_message: ✓ Click triggers alert mentioning 'activity:read' scope (1 instance found)

design_review.strava_card: ✓ Well-designed card with Google/Strava icon, connected status, and SYNC button
design_review.4km_pb_display: ✓ Clear PB card showing distance, time, pace, and date
design_review.edit_modal: ✓ Clean modal with proper labeling, inputs, and action buttons
design_review.medals_visual: ✓ Attractive medal cards with emoji icons (🥈), status labels, and progress bars
design_review.touch_targets: ✓ All buttons (edit, sync, modal buttons, tabs) properly sized and tappable
design_review.color_contrast: ✓ Lime green accents on dark background, orange for gold targets

ai_integration_change.details: Backend code (server.py line 559) confirmed using anthropic model: .with_model('anthropic', 'claude-4-sonnet-20250514'). Previous iteration used GPT-5.2. Change successfully implemented.
